description: Infoseek.ai builds AI-native app connectors and MCP-based integrations for tools such as travel planning, shopping, analytics, and map creation. Its site presents a directory of AI-connected apps and hosted MCP connectors for clients like ChatGPT and other MCP-capable tools.
summary: Infoseek.ai exposes a public MCP server for Map Maker at `https://prod.infoseek.ai/api/mcp/mapify`; no public REST/GraphQL API or CLI documentation was found on the domain.
